params.name: Tree of Life
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Fungus chest (1.5%), Home Value Pack II ($4.99), Lottery (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.03%)
params.description:
On Aug 15, 20,000 BC, the Tree of Life withered and closed the pathway to heaven.

The Tree of Life was planted in the center of the Garden of Eden. The path to the divine realm was closed after it withered. This symbol of the universe consists of 10 circles and 22 lines. A human who meditates under the tree could reach the Crown Realm and enter the depths of the universe. The 10 circles on the tree housed 10 angels who are responsible for guiding the different spiritual practices of mankind. 

 …
